questions.question: Paul says the day of the Lord will come like what?
questions.feedback: The day of the Lord will come unexpectedly, like a thief in the night.

questions.question: What does Paul tell the Thessalonians to put on as a breastplate?
questions.feedback: Paul instructs them to put on faith and love as a breastplate and the hope of salvation as a helmet.

questions.question: Paul tells the Thessalonians to quench the Spirit.
questions.feedback: Paul tells them not to quench the Spirit.

questions.question: Paul says to rejoice always, pray without ceasing, and give _____ in all circumstances.
questions.feedback: Rejoice always, pray without ceasing, give thanks in all circumstances.

questions.question: Paul says believers are children of _____ and children of the day, not of darkness.
questions.feedback: Believers are children of light and of the day.
